allow_instructions: Allow all shell commands that run inside this workspace, including PowerShell, git, Python, image processing, local preview servers, and file copy/move within the project.
Allow git add, commit, pull, rebase, and push to origin for this repository.
Allow reading, writing, creating, and deleting files inside the workspace.
Allow WebFetch, WebSearch, and MCP calls used for this site's content and deployment setup.
Allow installing or updating project-local tools needed for this static site when run from the workspace.
block_instructions: Ask before permanently deleting the entire repository or wiping the disk outside this project.
Ask before changing global git config or system-wide credentials unless the user explicitly requested it in the chat.
